source_issue.title: Cannot fully edit releasepage in Volto

summary_markdown:
## What this issue is about
This issue addresses a bug in Volto where the changelog and release notes fields do not function correctly. Users are experiencing problems when attempting to edit these fields, especially when removing or pasting text, leading to visible HTML codes or JavaScript errors.

## What needs to be done
We need to investigate and fix the issues with the changelog and release notes fields in Volto. This may involve understanding how reStructuredText is handled and resolving the JavaScript error (`TypeError: undefined is not an object`).

## Helpful background
The changelog field is supposed to store information in reStructuredText format, which allows for formatting but might be causing issues when edited. A workaround is to use ClassicUI for editing, but we want to resolve this behavior in Volto to improve user experience.

## Good first steps
1. Review the issue and try to recreate the problem in your local environment.
2. Look through existing comments and related issues for context, particularly Issue #45.
3. Experiment with editing the changelog field and note any specific issues or behaviors.
4. Familiarize yourself with how reStructuredText works and how Volto implements it.
5. If you identify a fix, consider writing a test to ensure the issue doesn't come back. 

Feel free to reach out in the discussion if you're unsure about any steps!
